name: Surface and retry failed OpenWiki merge activations

elements.name: Activation repair aligned
elements.documentation: Begin from the operator-settled retry and notification behavior recorded in TASK-26.

elements.name: Confirm aligned activation plan
elements.documentation: Confirm that the execution contract implements the settled TASK-26 outcome without broadening activation behavior.

elements.name: Plan confirmed?
elements.documentation: Proceed only while the diagram remains consistent with the already-aligned Task.

elements.name: Return to alignment
elements.documentation: A material mismatch or new commitment returns to the assigning orchestrator before implementation.

elements.name: Encode retryable failed markers
elements.documentation: Rewrite a marker to failed when dispatch raises after marker creation, retry only that explicit state, and retain successful dispatch dedupe.

elements.name: Notify protocol ActivationErrors
elements.documentation: Make the protocol-handler entry path raise a best-effort Herdr desktop notification for each surfaced ActivationError.

elements.name: Add retry and notification regressions
elements.documentation: Extend the isolated activation harness so the old blackhole and silent-error behavior fails observably.

elements.name: Run or rerun verification
elements.documentation: Join the initial implementation and in-scope repair paths before running the same fresh Checks.

elements.name: Run activation and repository Checks
elements.documentation: Run the focused activation harness, static checks, repository harnesses, and diff hygiene against the changed behavior.

elements.name: Checks green?
elements.documentation: Use fresh Check output to decide whether the implementation meets the Task or needs an in-scope repair.

elements.name: Repair in-scope failures
elements.documentation: Apply the smallest causal correction for a failed Task-specific Check, then rerun the same evidence path.

elements.name: Verify all four acceptance criteria
elements.documentation: Confirm failed dispatch retry, completed dispatch dedupe, ActivationError notification, and focused regression coverage from fresh results.

elements.name: Complete qq Change delivery
elements.documentation: Invoke the inherited reviewed, checked, finalized, one-PR delivery procedure.

elements.name: Green PR ready
elements.documentation: End when the reviewed activation repair is green and ready for operator disposition.
